project_progress_reminder.message:
PROJECT PROGRESS SUBMISSION & ASSESSMENT REMINDER

Dear BO1 and BO2,

Please continue to submit your Project Progress through the provided Canva link. Kindly note that only Task No. 7 is required for this submission.

Submission Deadline: 5 June 2026 (Friday)

Project Presentation
Presentations will commence during Week 14 (8 - 12 June 2026) and will be conducted during your respective tutorial sessions.

Final Assessment (Tentative)
Date: 20 June 2026 (Saturday)
Time: 9:00 AM - 11:00 AM

Please ensure that your project progress is updated and submitted on time. Late submissions may affect your overall assessment.
